title: artplants.de Artificial Hydrangea, lavender, 30"/75cm, Ø 7"/18cm - Silk flower/Fake hydrangea
features: total length approx. 30"/75 cm; flower diameter approx. 7"/18 cm; approx. 17"/42 cm from the bottom of the stem to the first leaf
5 inflorescences in colour lavender along with a natural arrangement of leaflets
spray with traces of the recent "growth" of the plant
optional treatment with UV-protection spray for long-lasting colour fidelity is recommended
ideal as a stunning individual decoration in a vase or as a lovely complement for arrangements
description: Brief description from artplants.de: Lavender-coloured artificial Hydrangea spray. The 30"/75 cm long spray is studded with three leaves and a bushy artificial bloom. Product description from artplants.de: Decorative Hydrangea lavender-coloured - natural appearance - total length approx. 30"/75 cm; flower diameter approx. 7"/18 cm; approx. 17"/42 cm from the bottom of the stem to the first leaf - 5 inflorescences in colour lavender along with a natural arrangement of leaflets - spray with traces of the recent "growth" of the plant - optional treatment with UV-protection spray for long-lasting colour fidelity is recommended - ideal as a stunning individual decoration in a vase or as a lovely complement for arrangements Important informations from artplants.de: For questions about our products, tips for decorating, care and much more, we are at your disposal by phone and email. For other contact information, please click on our seller name. Delivery without decoration and pot (Unless otherwise mentioned). Please note that some artificial plants in certain rooms require a fire protection treatment. Products meet B3 according DIN4102-1 – Please take into consideration relevant safety standards. For a long-lasting color fidelity in the indoor and outdoor use, it is recommended an optional treatment with artplants UV-protection spray at regular intervals. The need for the repetition depends on the location and the environmental conditions.
